name: LynxPrompt
longDescription:
LynxPrompt is a self-hosted platform for managing AI IDE rules and commands. It provides a universal configuration hub for tools like Cursor, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, Aider, and 20+ other AI coding assistants.

Create, share, and discover configuration blueprints through a web interface or CLI. Features include template variables for dynamic configurations, a blueprint marketplace, and instant project bootstrapping.

Self-host your own instance to keep your AI configurations private and under your control. The admin email provided during installation will be auto-promoted to superadmin on first login.
description: Self-hosted AI IDE configuration hub for Cursor, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, and 20+ AI coding assistants. Create, share, and discover configuration blueprints with template variables and a marketplace.
